2189990.name: Azure Striker GUNVOLT 3 - EX Image Pulses: Carrera, Gibril, and Milas pack
2189990.description:
This pack adds 4 skill-type Image Pulses of Azure Striker Gunvolt's "Carrera," 4 skill-type Image Pulses of Azure Striker Gunvolt 2's "Gibril," 4 skill-type Image Pulses of Azure Striker Gunvolt 2's "Milas," plus 4 additional passive-type Image Pulses, for a total of 16.

After purchasing this DLC, these new Image Pulses will be added to the available rewards for each mission in-game.
Collect Image Chips before clearing a mission to earn randomly-determined Image Pulses.
2189990.supported_languages:
英语*, 繁体中文, 日语*, 韩语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
*具有完全音频支持的语言
